test_name: Verify id column type is INT64
description: Check id column data type matches ICD specification
query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name = 'id'

description: Check orders table is present in the dataset

test_name: Verify id column exists in orders
description: Check id column is present in orders table
query: SELECT column_name FROM `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name = 'id'

test_name: Verify id column has no nulls
description: Check id column contains zero null values
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_count FROM `orders` WHERE id IS NULL

description: Check id column contains no duplicate values
query: SELECT COUNT(id) - COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS duplicate_count FROM `orders`

description: Check orders table is not empty after load
Check orders table partition information is available
query: SELECT partition_id, total_rows FROM `orders` TABLESAMPLE SYSTEM (1 PERCENT) LIMIT 1
expected_result: Query executes without error; partition metadata accessible

test_name: Verify no nulls in partition column
description: Check partition column contains no null values
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_partition_count FROM `orders` WHERE _PARTITIONTIME IS NULL

description: Check Airflow DAG run status is success
expected_result: DAG run state = 'success' with no failed tasks

description: Check DAG runs on expected schedule interval
expected_result: DAG schedule_interval matches defined ICD pipeline schedule

description: Check orders table load task ran without errors
expected_result: Task state = 'success' for orders load task
